lineItems.description: Discovery, Planning & Content Strategy — brand discovery, logo color extraction, information architecture, website copy, SEO keyword strategy, marketing strategy, brand guidelines, technical specification (5 documentation deliverables, ~2,630 lines)
Project Setup & Configuration — Next.js 16 / React 19 / TypeScript scaffolding, Tailwind CSS 4 custom theme with brand color system, ESLint, Vercel deployment config, environment setup

Design System & Component Library — 17 reusable components including Button (6 variants), Card system, HeroSlider carousel, ImpactStats, PageHero, Section system, SVG dividers, Logo, mega-menu navigation with mobile responsive hamburger menu

Page Development — 15 fully built pages: Homepage, About, Programs (overview + 4 detail pages), Leadership, Partners, Support (main + Founders Circle + Sponsorships), Contact, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, custom 404

SEO, Structured Data & Accessibility — global metadata (OpenGraph, Twitter Cards), page-specific meta tags, JSON-LD schemas (Organization, Website, 4 Services, Person, Breadcrumb), dynamic sitemap, robots.txt, WCAG accessibility
Refinement, Integration & QA — Formspree contact form integration, design overhaul pass, content accuracy review, bug fixes, leadership roster update, testing

recurringCharges.description: Website Hosting — Vercel production hosting, SSL certificate, CDN, continuous deployment

notes: Deliverables: 15 production-ready pages, 17 reusable components, 5 strategy/planning documents, complete SEO implementation with structured data, WCAG-accessible mobile-responsive design, Vercel deployment-ready. Recurring hosting charge of $30.00/month begins upon deployment.
